examples: I have set a sun lounger on the beach.
There is a storage space under the lounger.
Broad muscular fields, branches of live oak, loving lounger in my.
The temptation is strong to take to a lounger and lapse into basking-iguana consciousness.
At all three, it is possible to spend the day watching tugboats sail to and fro, without leaving the comfort of a pool lounger.
